title: Block Veins
description: Adds naturally generated resource block veins into the world
body:
![block veins logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572256e1293e6c98969bc7aa60bf4109fd6cf672.png)
>A world-generation mod that introduces *resource block veins* into the Overworld.
# Caves now Generate:
### Diamond Blocks  
### Gold Blocks  
### Emerald Blocks  
### Iron Blocks  
### Lapis Blocks 
## 
# **Key Feature**
### Veins **only** generate when exactly one block is exposed to air
### **Exploration Focus**
##
>![resource blocks lining the walls of a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0cec70c30fdf6fbbf2d42946274a2fd2b463bc.jpeg)
## 
<details>
<summary>image disclaimer</summary>
  
some images contain human placed blocks to for dramatic effect which is used to showcase the mod's feature

</details>


# **Perfect For**
### Modpacks (hard ones where getting op quick is a must)   
### Players who dislike grindy strip-mining (like me lol) 
## 
>![resource blocks lining the walls of a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb75bc0ff43c8f75fbdfaa9b3903380934c7cfa.jpeg)
## 
# **Modpack Creators**
>you can use my mod in the pack!
